  • Uses of ApiError in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller that return types with arguments of type ApiError
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleAmbiguousData(org.springframework.dao.IncorrectResultSizeDataAccessException ex)
    A lookup that must yield a single row found several.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleBadRequest(IllegalArgumentException ex)
     
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleCommandFailed(ResourceCommandFailedException ex)
     
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleConflict(IllegalStateException ex)
     
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleDataIntegrityViolation(org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException ex)
    A rejected constraint (a foreign key still pointing at the row being deleted, a unique violation) is a conflict with the current data — not a permission problem.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleForbidden(org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException ex)
     
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleNotFound(Exception ex)
     
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleResourceOffline(ResourceOfflineException ex)
     
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleSlotNotReserved(SlotNotReservedException ex)
     
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiError>
    GlobalExceptionHandler.handleUnreadableBody(org.springframework.http.converter.HttpMessageNotReadableException ex)
    A body that cannot be deserialized is a client mistake, so it must read as 400.
